settings.name: Sai Tharun Varma Addala
settings.title: Mechanical Engineer | CAD Designer
settings.summary: Driving mechanical innovation through CAD, simulation, and advanced manufacturing, I am currently pursuing an M.Sc. in Intelligent Manufacturing at TU Clausthal. I have hands-on experience in mechanical design, structural analysis, CFD, CAM simulation, and prototype development across academic and internship projects. My work includes designing BAJA SAE chassis systems, contributing to a championship-winning electric go-kart, and publishing research on bio-mimetic MAVs.. I am seeking Mechanical Design, R&D, or Advanced Manufacturing roles where I can apply my technical skills, problem-solving ability, and collaborative mindset.

items.description: Designed and modelled complex BAJA SAE INDIA chassis and steering mechanisms, ensuring optimal component packaging. Integrated steering geometry into the main assembly, improving directional control and handling precision. Developed detailed 3D models of structural components, maintaining design clarity for the fabrication team. Performed structural analysis on the chassis to evaluate weight distribution and material strength under various load conditions. Utilized HyperMesh and Ansys for mesh optimization and Finite Element Analysis (FEA) to ensure structural safety. Validated chassis durability against specifications, identifying and resolving high-stress concentration areas.

items.title: Fabrication of an Electric Go-Kart
items.description: Manufacturing and assembly of an E-Cart, focusing on chassis design and steering alignment to meet competitive standards. Tools: SolidWorks, Ansys Workbench, AISI 1018 Steel.

items.title: Bio-Mimetic Micro Air Vehicles (MAV) for Surveillance
items.description: Design and performance assessment of a bird-inspired MAV, achieving 0.6054 N lift through advanced fluid dynamics. Tools: Catia V5, ANSYS Workbench R21, MATLAB.

items.title: CAM Simulation of Rocket Landing Gear Component
items.description: Optimized a rocket landing tray holder for manufacturability by applying DfM and DfX principles in Siemens NX, ensuring structural integrity and precision. Developed a full 3-axis CAM simulation using Sinumerik machine setups to program toolpaths and production sequences for high-precision aluminum aerospace components. Tools: Siemens NX (Manufacturing Module), 3-axis CNC Simulation, CAD, DfX Principles.

items.institution: Anil Neerukonda Institutes of Technology and Sciences

items.title: Published Researcher
items.description: Authored a research paper on Bio-Mimetic Micro Air Vehicles (MAV) for Surveillance.

items.title: EdgeLine Championship
items.description: Won the national-level competition for the design and development of an e-Kart.

items.title: Robot War
items.description: Secured first place in the university combat robotics event through mechanical design and strategic execution.

items.title: Professional Memberships
items.description: Actively contributed to SAE India and ISHRAE student chapters during B.Tech studies.

items.title: National Level Recognition
items.description: Represented my institution in high-stakes engineering championships and technical workshops.
